title: Foreign super funds
description: How to access money in a foreign super fund (may be called a retirement fund, pension fund, retirement savings plan).
keywords: super foreign fund, transfer foreign super, withdraw super overseas, New Zealand super, KiwiSaver

child_links.title: Transfer or withdraw from a foreign super fund
child_links.description: Options for transferring or withdrawing money from a foreign super fund and the tax implications in Australia.

child_links.title: Transfer from a foreign super fund to an Australian super fund
child_links.description: Tax treatment and rules that apply to transfers from a foreign super fund to an Australian super fund.

child_links.title: Withdraw a lump sum directly from a foreign super fund
child_links.description: How a lump sum received from a foreign super fund is taxed.

child_links.title: Trans-Tasman retirement savings transfers
child_links.description: How you can transfer money between Australian super funds and New Zealand KiwiSaver schemes.
